h1270f479g8ff3g456eg842bg2b0e1f1f55a4: To think that this place was once a refuge.
h7ee8bd15ged43g4023ga28fg371bd2cc8d39: Please - come speak with me in the cave. I have an urgent matter to discuss with you.
h6c4506e7gf0e1g49bbgb126g12f27b1b3515: Let's talk, later. Our troubles aren't over yet - the goblins are still out there.
hbf6c516fge67ag4acbga648g794d6dd89019: I knew Kagha had twisted them, but for so many to turn on us...
h8dfc79efgd60cg47b2ga098ge3e4ce01bdc3: Thank you for standing with us. I need to check on my people, but come see me when you have a chance.
h691691b6g2307g421fgaf9cge1cb495570a1: Prepare yourself - I believe the druids are moving on us.
